mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO COMPANY_SPECIALTY (COMPANY_NO, SPECIALTY_NO, MEMO) VALUES ( #{companyNo}, #{specialtyNo},
#{etcMemo} NULL
)
SELECT * FROM DUAL
mapper.select: select C.COMPANY_NO ,C.COMPANY_UUID ,C.BUSINESS_NO ,C.COMPANY_NAME ,C.REPRESENTATIVE_NAME ,C.PHONE ,C.EMAIL ,C.CREATED_ON ,C.STATUS ,CS.MEMO ,S.FIELD from COMPANY C left join COMPANY_SPECIALTY CS on(CS.COMPANY_NO = C.COMPANY_NO) left join SPECIALTY S on(S.SPECIALTY_NO = CS.SPECIALTY_NO) where C.COMPANY_UUID = #{companyUuid}
